ksa_text: Knowledge of AI risk management roles, responsibilities, and accountability structures, including executive-level oversight design, RACI-based governance frameworks, cross-functional coordination models, and the organizational conditions required for effective AI risk decision-making.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-K-009 (AG, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4675 is insufficient to establish relevance to analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.467, eu_ai_act=0.454, dcwf=0.405) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4675 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AG-domain KSA AG-K-009 (composite 0.4675) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AG domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Composite 0.4675 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AG domain KSA at composite 0.4675 is not a standard requirement for Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4675, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
